summary: Completed Channel Manager v2 Phase 6 testing. All 59 tests pass (25 API tests + 34 unit tests). Fixed 3 frontend API endpoint mismatches for mapping readiness and validation. All 6 phases implemented and verified.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 phases verified: Reconciliation, HotelRunner push, Mapping screen, Scheduler, Credential encryption, Event sync
Fixed frontend endpoint mismatches: fetchMappingReadiness, handleValidateAllMappings, handleValidateMapping
Reconciliation API: 8 issue types supported (inventory_mismatch, rate_mismatch, missing_reservation, stale_sync, invalid_mapping, ack_failed, ack_pending_too_long, unprocessed_import)
Issue lifecycle transitions: open -> investigating -> retrying -> resolved | dismissed
Credential vault: Encryption/decryption roundtrip working, masking working
Event sync: 7 event types supported (booking_created/modified/cancelled, room_blocked/unblocked, rate_changed, restriction_changed)
Scheduler: run-all and run-per-connector endpoints working
Frontend Mapping tab: Readiness progress bar (77%), filter buttons (All/Valid/Invalid), validation badges working
seed_data_creation: Test reconciliation issues created during API testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 6 features tested and working. Backend API tests in test_channel_manager_v2_phase6.py cover all new endpoints. Frontend was fixed for 3 endpoint mismatches. Mapping tab shows readiness progress bar, validation badges, and filter buttons correctly.
mocked_apis_note: HotelRunner push_availability/push_rates are stubs - they build XML but actual HTTP calls to HotelRunner sandbox will fail since no real HotelRunner account exists. Event sync service depends on inventory_sync_service which also has stubs.
